# americancloud_vm_package (Data Source)

Look up a VM package (compute tier) by its label, including its CPU/memory/disk limits.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "americancloud_vm_package" "standard" {
  label = "standard-custom"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `label` (String) VM package label, e.g. `standard-custom`.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Package description.
- `id` (String) Package identifier (UUID).
- `max_cpu` (Number) Maximum vCPUs.
- `max_memory_mb` (Number) Maximum memory (MB).
- `max_root_disk_gb` (Number) Maximum root disk (GB).
- `min_cpu` (Number) Minimum vCPUs.
- `min_memory_mb` (Number) Minimum memory (MB).
- `min_root_disk_gb` (Number) Minimum root disk (GB).
- `tier` (String) Service tier.
